title: polygala vulgaris proles lejeunei
intro: Polygala vulgaris proles lejeunei, also known as Polygala lejeunei, is a plant species within the milkwort family (Polygalaceae) that is native to North America. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Polygala lejeunei include its ability to relieve coughs, reduce mucus production, and alleviate stress. Herbal preparations of Polygala lejeunei include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be prepared by steeping the plant's leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent, allowing for the extraction of its medicinal compounds.
